scripts.electron:build: ELECTRON_BUILD=1 next build --webpack && tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json && electron-builder
scripts.electron:build:win: ELECTRON_BUILD=1 next build --webpack && tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json && electron-builder --win
scripts.electron:build:mac: ELECTRON_BUILD=1 next build --webpack && tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json && electron-builder --mac
scripts.electron:publish:win: node scripts/bake-update-token.mjs && ELECTRON_BUILD=1 next build --webpack && tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json && electron-builder --win --publish always
scripts.electron:publish:mac: node scripts/bake-update-token.mjs && ELECTRON_BUILD=1 next build --webpack && tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json && electron-builder --mac --publish always
